reason: Browser use feature successfully executes browser tools - agent can open browser, navigate to URLs, retrieve page content and report findings
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing the Super Agent interface with sidebar listing agents
Found and clicked the "QA-20260602-194539-8oyq" agent in sidebar — Agent opened showing chat interface with message input field
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in input field — Message was entered and visible in the text box
Clicked Send button to submit the message — Message was sent, agent status changed to "working", session "Browser Page Title Lookup" created
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent completed work in 11 seconds

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly states "The page title is 'Example Domain'" and confirms "Its title/main heading is 'Example Domain'" after successfully loading the page
